ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the year to which the metric applies */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the country to which the metric applies */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the metric definition */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of the metric value */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the metric data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last update date of the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* The year for which the data is recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The default unit of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* The primary source of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last update date of the metric definition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* The Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency used in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last update date of the country data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
